title: Error accessing `typedef` declared inside parameterized class

features.name: typedef accessed via scope resolution from parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a typedef declared inside a parameterized class and accessed through the scope resolution operator from a class reference with empty parameter list

features.name: type from parameterized class used as class parameter
features.description: Code should include a type alias extracted from a parameterized class being used as a parameter type in another parameterized class

features.name: parameterized class with empty parameter list in type reference
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class reference using empty parameter list parentheses when accessing nested types
